belongs_to_collection.name: 女上司、歪んだ刺激と躾に溺れる、SM不倫性交。

response.original_title: JUR-607 女上司、歪んだ刺激と躾に溺れる、SM不倫性交。昼休みはダメな部下に躾けられて…。 専属美女の『苦しみ』という快楽を解放―。藤かんな
response.overview: Kanna, the sales manager at an office equipment sales company in Tokyo, was stressed out by the excessive expectations from her company, her demanding workload, and her strained relationship with her husband. In addition, she was troubled by her relationship with her incompetent subordinate, Yoshino. One day, however, she let her guard down in front of him, and to her horror, he pinned her down and discovered her masochistic tendencies. From then on, she was taken to an S&M hotel during her lunch breaks, where pain and pleasure were imprinted on her body, and she was trained by her subordinate to be an obedient female dog…
response.title: JUR-607 A Female Boss Indulges In Twisted Stimulation And Discipline, Engaging In SM Adultery. During Lunch Break, She Is Disciplined By Her Useless Subordinate... The Pleasure Of "suffering" Is Released By A Beautiful, Exclusive Woman. Kanna Fuji
